name: HWM_TM_REP_S_HXT_ATRBS_V
query: SELECT HxtAtrbs.tm_rep_atrb_id Hxt_Time_Repos_Atrb_Id, HxtAtrbs.attribute_category Hxt_attribute_category, HxtAtrbs.attribute_varchar3 EXPEDITE, HxtAtrbs.attribute_varchar4 OVERRIDE_PAY_METHOD, HxtAtrbs.attribute_varchar5 OVERRIDE_CHECK_PRINTER, HxtAtrbs.attribute_number1 Hxt_Resolved_Period_Id, HxtAtrbs.attribute_varchar2 Hxt_Day, HxtAtrbsUsg.usages_source_id, HxtAtrbsUsg.usages_source_version FROM hwm_tm_rep_atrbs HxtAtrbs, hwm_tm_rep_atrb_usages HxtAtrbsUsg WHERE HxtAtrbs.tm_rep_atrb_id = HxtAtrbsUsg.tm_rep_atrb_id and HxtAtrbs.attribute_category = 'HXT'
